roomFull.title: Room is full
roomFull.description: This room already has 4 players. Please create a new room or try another link.

copyRoomLink.description: Share it manually with your friend

failed.title: Connection failed

lost.title: Connection lost
lost.description: The connection was interrupted. You have been returned to the home screen.
